6487ac4fdca6572b106f52cc.question: A product of this name that was designed "to become an omnimedium" was publicly demonstrated with both Amelia Earhart and Eleanor Roosevelt before the company went bankrupt. An inventor had to throw pebbles at kids to keep them from climbing onto the roof of a structure of this name in Carbondale, Illinois. That house of this name had (*) hexagonal walls making it hard to hang pictures. For 10 points, name this word used in a number of products dreamed up by Buckminster Fuller, which combines "dynamic" with two other words.

6487ac4fdca6572b106f52cc.answer: Dymaxion [accept Dymaxion car or Dymaxion house or Dymaxion map or Dymaxion sleep]
